CREATE TABLE test_table (id UInt32, value String) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
SELECT groupArrayInsertAt(toString(id), id * 2) FROM test_table WHERE id <= 3;
SELECT groupArrayInsertAt(value, 2) FROM (SELECT value FROM test_table ORDER BY id DESC) AS subquery;
CREATE TABLE another_table (num UInt32) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY num;
SELECT groupArrayInsertAt(value, 1) FROM (SELECT value FROM test_table) AS subquery1 JOIN (SELECT toString(num) AS num_value FROM another_table) AS subquery2 ON test_table.id = another_table.num;
CREATE TABLE multi_table_test (group_id UInt32, data String) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY group_id;
SELECT groupArrayInsertAt(data, 2) FROM multi_table_test GROUP BY group_id;
SELECT groupArrayInsertAt('-', 3)(data, group_id) FROM multi_table_test GROUP BY group_id ORDER BY group_id DESC;
SELECT groupArrayInsertAt(value, 0) FROM (SELECT value FROM test_table ORDER BY id) ARRAY JOIN (SELECT num FROM another_table WHERE num > 1) AS join_table;
SELECT groupArrayInsertAt(value, 3) FROM (SELECT value FROM test_table) LIMIT 2;
